text:
There was a tiny house nestled beside a meandering brook.

Each morning, the resident bird chirped happily.

One fine day, the bird let out a trilling call that sent a ripple through the brook.

Curious, the tiny housekeeper hollered up.

"Good morning!" the bird sang. "Could I borrow your whistle?"

The caretaker frowned. "Whistle?"

But she heard the melody.

Her heart swelled. That whistle held memories.

With a hopeful whistle, the bird soared away.

And somewhere downwind...

A cat let out a playful meow.

A catnip dream was born.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
